actors.name: Muddywater
actors.description: Muddywater is a suspected Iranian APT group that has been active since at least 2017, targeting organizations primarily in government, energy, telecommunications, and IT sectors across the Middle East and North Africa region.

operational_profile.tradecraft_summary: Multi-stage infection chain with custom malware (Meterpreter variants, Powerstager), living-off-the-land techniques, and MITRE ATT&CK alignment in execution and persistence phases.

actors.name: Generic Credential Abuse (Any Threat Actor)
actors.description: Generic detection for common credential abuse and brute force techniques used by many threat actors, malware families, and opportunistic attackers.

operational_profile.tradecraft_summary: Opportunistic password guessing, spray attacks, and lateral movement using compromised credentials.

actors.name: Generic Code Execution (Any Threat Actor)
actors.description: Generic detection for command execution and script-based malware delivery used across multiple threat actors and malware families.

operational_profile.tradecraft_summary: Living-off-the-land techniques, PowerShell abuse, encoded command execution, and fileless malware delivery.

actors.name: Generic Data Exfiltration (Insider Threat / Misconfiguration)
actors.description: Generic detection for data exposure, misconfiguration, and exfiltration patterns that may indicate insider threats, compromised credentials, or cloud misconfigurations.

operational_profile.tradecraft_summary: Unauthorized access to cloud resources, API abuse, bucket/share permission escalation, and bulk data download patterns.
